Core Conversation 180

agreement 7

确què实shíindeed / true

确 (certainly)实 (truly)

  • 确实，这个问题比我想的更复杂。Indeed, this problem is more complicated than I thought.
Read more →
我wǒ同tóng意yìI agree

我 (I)同 (same)意 (opinion)

  • 我同意你的看法。I agree with your opinion.
Read more →
没méi错cuòexactly / that’s right

没 (not)错 (wrong)

  • 没错，问题就在这里。Exactly, that’s where the problem is.
Read more →
对duì对duì对duìright, right, right

对 (right)

  • 对对对，我也是这么想的。Right, right, right, I also think so.
Read more →
也yě是shìthat’s true

也 (also)是 (be)

  • 外面太冷了。也是，那我们就待在家吧。It’s too cold outside. True, then let’s stay home.
Read more →
你nǐ说shuō得dé对duìyou’re right

你 (you)说 (say)得 (particle)对 (right)

  • 你说得对，我从来没想过这个角度。You’re right, I never thought about it from this angle.
Read more →
有yǒu道dào理lǐmakes sense / reasonable

有 (have)道 (way)理 (reason)

  • 你说得有道理。What you said makes sense.
Read more →

clarification 6

就jiù是shì说shuōwhat I mean is / that is to say

就 (emphasis)是 (be)说 (say)

  • 就是说，你不同意这个方案？So what you mean is, you don’t agree with this plan?
Read more →
换huàn句jù话huà说shuōin other words

换 (change)句 (sentence)话 (words)说 (say)

  • 换句话说，这个问题其实没那么复杂。In other words, this problem actually isn’t that complicated.
Read more →
我wǒ的de意yì思si是shìwhat I mean is

我 (I)的 (possessive)意 (meaning)思 (thought)是 (be)

  • 我的意思是，还有更好的选择。What I mean is, there are better options.
Read more →
简jiǎn单dān来lái说shuōsimply put

简 (simple)单 (single)来 (come)说 (say)

  • 简单来说，你需要多练习。Simply put, you need to practice more.
Read more →
所suǒ以yǐ说shuōso what I’m saying is

所 (so)以 (therefore)说 (say)

  • 所以说，我们应该早点准备。So what I’m saying is, we should prepare earlier.
Read more →
我wǒ不bú是shì说shuōI’m not saying

我 (I)不 (not)是 (be)说 (say)

  • 我不是说你做得不好，只是觉得可以更好。I’m not saying you did badly, I just think it could be better.
Read more →

closing 5

那nà就jiù这zhè样yàng吧balet’s leave it at that

那 (then)就 (just)这 (this)样 (way)吧 (modal)

  • 好的，那就这样吧，回头再联系。Alright, let’s leave it at that and talk later.
Read more →
先xiān这zhè样yàngthat’s all for now

先 (first)这 (this)样 (way)

  • 好，先这样，我们明天再聊。Okay, that’s all for now; let’s talk tomorrow.
Read more →
回huí头tóu再zài说shuōlet’s talk later / we’ll discuss it later

回 (return)头 (head)再 (again)说 (say)

  • 这件事先不急，回头再说。This isn’t urgent; let’s talk about it later.
Read more →
我wǒ先xiān走zǒu了leI’ll get going

我 (I)先 (first)走 (leave)了 (perfective)

  • 好了，我先走了，下次再见！Alright, I’ll get going. See you next time!
Read more →
改gǎi天tiān再zài聊liáolet’s chat another day

改 (change)天 (day)再 (again)聊 (chat)

  • 今天聊得很开心，改天再聊！It was great chatting today; let’s talk another day!
Read more →

connector 24

然rán后hòuand then

然 (so)后 (after)

  • 我们先吃饭，然后去看电影。We’ll eat first, and then go watch a movie.
Read more →
其qí实shíactually

其 (actually)实 (truth)

  • 其实我以前也不喜欢吃辣的。Actually, I didn’t use to like spicy food.
Read more →
而ér且qiěand also / moreover

而 (and)且 (also)

  • 这家店东西好吃，而且很便宜。This place has good food, and it’s also cheap.
Read more →
另lìng外wàiadditionally / also

另 (other)外 (outside)

  • 另外，我还想问你一件事。Also, I’d like to ask you something else.
Read more →
还hái有yǒuand another thing / also

还 (also)有 (have)

  • 我需要买水果，还有牛奶。I need to buy fruit, and also milk.
Read more →
不bú但dàn…而ér且qiěnot only…but also

不 (not)但 (only)而 (and)且 (also)

  • 这个方法不但简单，而且效果很好。This method is not only simple, but also effective.
Read more →
甚shèn至zhìeven

甚 (even)至 (reach)

  • 他太忙了，甚至没时间吃饭。He’s so busy he doesn’t even have time to eat.
Read more →
再zài加jiā上shàngon top of that

再 (again)加 (add)上 (on)

  • 人不够，再加上天气不好，计划取消了。There weren’t enough people, and on top of that the weather was bad, so the plan was cancelled.
Read more →
特tè别bié是shìespecially

特 (special)别 (kind)是 (be)

  • 我喜欢水果，特别是苹果。I like fruit, especially apples.
Read more →
不bú过guòbut / however

不 (not)过 (pass)

  • 这道菜不错，不过有点咸。This dish is good, but a bit salty.
Read more →
虽suī然rán…但dàn是shìalthough…but

虽 (although)然 (so)但 (but)是 (be)

  • 虽然很累，但是我觉得值得。Although I’m tired, I think it was worth it.
Read more →
反fǎn而érinstead / on the contrary

反 (opposite)而 (yet)

  • 我没复习，考试反而考得更好。I didn’t review, but actually did better on the exam.
Read more →
另lìng一yì方fāng面miànon the other hand

另 (other)一 (one)方 (side)面 (face)

  • 一方面我想出国，另一方面我不想离开家人。On one hand I want to go abroad; on the other, I don’t want to leave my family.
Read more →
相xiāng反fǎnon the contrary

相 (mutually)反 (opposite)

  • 我以为他会生气，相反，他很平静。I thought he would be angry; on the contrary, he was calm.
Read more →
不bù管guǎn怎zěn样yànganyway / no matter what

不 (not)管 (regardless)怎 (how)样 (way)

  • 不管怎样，我都会去。No matter what, I will go.
Read more →
因yīn为wèi…所suǒ以yǐbecause…so

因 (because)为 (for)所 (that)以 (therefore)

  • 因为他每天练习，所以进步很快。Because he practices every day, he improves quickly.
Read more →
这zhè就jiù是shì为wèi什shén么methis is why

这 (this)就 (precisely)是 (be)为 (for)什 (what)么 (suffix)

  • 这就是为什么我觉得学汉字很重要。This is why I think learning characters is important.
Read more →
既jì然ránsince / now that

既 (since)然 (so)

  • 既然已经决定了，就不要后悔。Since you’ve already decided, don’t regret it.
Read more →
结jié果guǒas a result

结 (result)果 (outcome)

  • 他没准备，结果失败了。He didn’t prepare, and as a result he failed.
Read more →
要yào不bù然ránotherwise

要 (if)不 (not)然 (so)

  • 你得快点，要不然我们会迟到。You need to hurry, otherwise we’ll be late.
Read more →
毕bì竟jìngafter all

毕 (finally)竟 (after all)

  • 毕竟他只学了半年，已经很不错了。After all, he has only studied for half a year, so it’s already pretty good.
Read more →
一yì般bān来lái说shuōgenerally speaking

一 (one)般 (kind)来 (come)说 (say)

  • 一般来说，我晚上比较有空。Generally speaking, I’m more free in the evening.
Read more →
听tīng说shuōI heard / it’s said

听 (hear)说 (say)

  • 听说他要回国了。Heard he’s going home.
Read more →
据jù说shuōsupposedly / it’s said

据 (according)说 (say)

  • 据说这家店特别好吃。Supposedly this place is great.
Read more →

contrast 4

不bú过guòbut / however

不 (not)过 (pass)

  • 这道菜不错，不过有点咸。This dish is good, but a bit salty.

反fǎn而érinstead / on the contrary

反 (opposite)而 (yet)

  • 我没复习，考试反而考得更好。I didn’t review, but actually did better on the exam.
Read more →
另lìng一yì方fāng面miànon the other hand

另 (other)一 (one)方 (side)面 (face)

  • 一方面我想出国，另一方面我不想离开家人。On one hand I want to go abroad; on the other, I don’t want to leave my family.
Read more →
相xiāng反fǎnon the contrary

相 (mutually)反 (opposite)

  • 我以为他会生气，相反，他很平静。I thought he would be angry; on the contrary, he was calm.

conversation-glue 42

那nà个geum / uh

那 (that)个 (measure)

  • 那个……我刚刚要说什么来着？Uh… what was I about to say?
Read more →
怎zěn么me说shuō呢nehow should I put it

怎 (how)么 (suffix)说 (say)呢 (modal)

  • 他这个人嘛，怎么说呢，挺有意思的。This guy, how should I put it… he’s quite interesting.
Read more →
就jiù是shì说shuōwhat I mean is / that is to say

就 (emphasis)是 (be)说 (say)

  • 就是说，你不同意这个方案？So what you mean is, you don’t agree with this plan?
Read more →
我wǒ想xiǎng想xiǎnglet me think

我 (I)想 (think)

  • 我想想，上次见他好像是去年的事了。Let me think, last time I saw him was last year.
Read more →
等děng一yí下xiàhold on a sec

等 (wait)一 (one)下 (moment)

  • 等一下，你刚才说的那个地方叫什么？Hold on, what was that place you mentioned?
Read more →
然rán后hòuand then

然 (so)后 (after)

  • 我们先吃饭，然后去看电影。We’ll eat first, and then go watch a movie.
Read more →
我wǒ觉jué得deI think

我 (I)觉 (feel)得 (particle)

  • 我觉得你说的有道理。I think what you said makes sense.
Read more →
我wǒ感gǎn觉juéI feel / I feel like

我 (I)感 (sense)觉 (feel)

  • 我感觉这样做不太合适。I feel like doing it this way is not very suitable.
Read more →
说shuō实shí话huàto be honest

说 (say)实 (true)话 (words)

  • 说实话，我一开始觉得我学不会中文。To be honest, at first I thought I couldn’t learn Chinese.
Read more →
其qí实shíactually

其 (actually)实 (truth)

  • 其实我以前也不喜欢吃辣的。Actually, I didn’t use to like spicy food.
Read more →
坦tǎn白bái说shuōfrankly speaking

坦 (frank)白 (plain)说 (say)

  • 坦白说，我对这个结果不太满意。Frankly speaking, I’m not very satisfied with this result.
Read more →
要yào我wǒ说shuōif you ask me

要 (if)我 (I)说 (say)

  • 要我说，这个办法更好。If you ask me, this method is better.
Read more →
我wǒ看kànI’d say / in my view

我 (I)看 (see)

  • 我看这件事没那么简单。I’d say this matter isn’t that simple.
Read more →
原yuán来lái如rú此cǐI see / so that’s how it is

原 (originally)来 (come)如 (so)此 (this)

  • 原来如此，我明白了。So that’s how it is — I understand now.
Read more →
然rán后hòu呢neand then what?

然 (so)后 (after)呢 (modal)

  • 你到了那里，然后呢？You got there, and then what?
Read more →
确què实shíindeed / true

确 (certainly)实 (truly)

  • 确实，这个问题比我想的更复杂。Indeed, this problem is more complicated than I thought.
Read more →
这zhè样yàng啊aoh, I see

这 (this)样 (way)啊 (modal)

  • 这样啊，那我明白了。Oh, I see — I understand now.
Read more →
难nán怪guàino wonder

难 (hardly)怪 (strange)

  • 难怪他昨天那么累。No wonder he was so tired yesterday.
Read more →
反fǎn正zhènganyway / in any case

反 (anyway)正 (regardless)

  • 反正已经迟到了，别着急了。We’re already late anyway, so don’t stress.
Read more →
对duì了leby the way / oh right

对 (right)了 (particle)

  • 对了，我差点忘了告诉你一件事。Oh right, I almost forgot to tell you something.
Read more →
说shuō到dào这zhè个gespeaking of this

说 (speak)到 (to)这 (this)个 (measure)

  • 说到这个，我想起来一件事。Speaking of this, I remembered something.
Read more →
换huàn个gè话huà题tíchange the subject

换 (change)个 (measure)话 (talk)题 (topic)

  • 别说这个了，换个话题吧。Let’s not talk about this; let’s change the subject.
Read more →
过guò奖jiǎng了leyou flatter me

过 (over)奖 (praise)了 (particle)

  • 你中文说得真好！过奖了，我还在学习。Your Chinese is really good! You flatter me, I’m still learning.
Read more →
一yì般bān来lái说shuōgenerally speaking

一 (one)般 (kind)来 (come)说 (say)

  • 一般来说，我晚上比较有空。Generally speaking, I’m more free in the evening.
Read more →
有yǒu道dào理lǐ吗madoes that make sense?

有 (have)道 (way)理 (reason)吗 (question)

  • 我这样说有道理吗？Does what I’m saying make sense?
Read more →
有yǒu道dào理lǐmakes sense / reasonable

有 (have)道 (way)理 (reason)

  • 你说得有道理。What you said makes sense.
Read more →
可kě惜xī啦lathat’s a pity

可 (can)惜 (pity)啦 (modal)

  • 你不能来？可惜啦！You can’t come? That’s a pity!
Read more →
那nà必bì须xū的de！of course! / absolutely!

那 (that)必 (must)须 (necessary)的 (particle)

  • 你会继续学中文吗？那必须的！Will you keep learning Chinese? Of course!
Read more →
这zhè么me说shuō吧balet’s put it this way

这 (this)么 (suffix)说 (say)吧 (modal)

  • 这么说吧，我不是不喜欢，只是不太习惯。Let’s put it this way: it’s not that I dislike it, I’m just not used to it.
Read more →
看kàn个gè人rén吧badepends on the person

看 (depend)个 (measure)人 (person)吧 (modal)

  • 好不好用？看个人吧。Is it easy to use? It depends on the person.
Read more →
还hái行xíng吧ba，还hái行xíng吧bait’s okay / just so-so

还 (still)行 (okay)吧 (modal)

  • 这家店怎么样？还行吧，还行吧。How is this restaurant? It’s okay, just so-so.
Read more →
客kè观guān地dì来lái讲jiǎngobjectively speaking

客 (object)观 (view)地 (adverbial)来 (come)讲 (speak)

  • 客观地来讲，这个办法更安全。Objectively speaking, this method is safer.
Read more →
你nǐ懂dǒng的deyou know what I mean

你 (you)懂 (understand)的 (particle)

  • 这个事情有点复杂，你懂的。This thing is a bit complicated, you know what I mean.
Read more →
差chà不bu多duōabout / roughly / close enough

差 (differ)不 (not)多 (much)

  • 差不多了，我们走吧。Close enough, let’s go.
Read more →
没méi办bàn法fǎnothing you can do / no choice

没 (not)办 (handle)法 (method)

  • 没办法，只能等了。Nothing to do but wait.
Read more →
看kàn情qíng况kuàngit depends

看 (depend)情 (situation)况 (status)

  • 明天去不去？看情况吧。Going tomorrow? Depends.
Read more →
怎zěn么me办bànwhat should I do / what now

怎 (how)么 (suffix)办 (handle)

  • 钥匙丢了，怎么办？Lost my key, what do I do?
Read more →
听tīng说shuōI heard / it’s said

听 (hear)说 (say)

  • 听说他要回国了。Heard he’s going home.
Read more →
据jù说shuōsupposedly / it’s said

据 (according)说 (say)

  • 据说这家店特别好吃。Supposedly this place is great.
Read more →
算suàn了leforget it / let it go

算 (count)了 (particle)

  • 算了，别想了。Forget it, stop thinking about it.
Read more →
我wǒ跟gēn你nǐ说shuōlet me tell you

我 (I)跟 (with)你 (you)说 (say)

  • 我跟你说，他根本没去。Listen, he didn’t even go.
Read more →
拜bài托tuōplease / come on

拜 (pray)托 (entrust)

  • 拜托你帮个忙。Please help me out.

Can be a real request or a sarcastic “oh come on”.

culture 13

民mín歌gēfolk song

民 (folk)歌 (song)

  • 我想听一些中国民歌。I want to listen to some Chinese folk songs.
Read more →
省shěng份fènprovince

省 (province)份 (share)

  • 四川是中国的一个省份。Sichuan is a province in China.
Read more →
心xīn灵líng鸡jī汤tāngmotivational / inspirational content, often cliché or cheesy

心 (heart)灵 (spirit)鸡 (chicken)汤 (soup)

  • 这句话有点像心灵鸡汤。This sentence is kind of like motivational cliché content.
Read more →
圣shèng诞dàn节jiéChristmas

圣 (holy)诞 (birth)节 (festival)

  • 你圣诞节有什么计划？What plans do you have for Christmas?
Read more →
圣shèng诞dàn老lǎo人rénSanta Claus

圣 (holy)诞 (birth)老 (old)人 (person)

  • 小孩子相信圣诞老人。Children believe in Santa Claus.
Read more →
诗shī词cípoetry / classical poetry

诗 (poetry)词 (lyric)

  • 我想学习一些中国诗词。I want to study some Chinese poetry.
Read more →
土tǔ生shēng土tǔ长zhǎngborn and raised locally

土 (local)生 (born)长 (raised)

  • 他是土生土长的北京人。He was born and raised in Beijing.
Read more →
经jīng典diǎnclassic

经 (classic)典 (canon)

  • 这是一首经典老歌。This is a classic old song.
Read more →
女nǚ士shì优yōu先xiānladies first

女 (female)士 (person)优 (priority)先 (first)

  • 女士优先，请你先进去。Ladies first, please go in first.
Read more →
特tè别bié的de风fēng土tǔ人rén情qíngunique local customs and traditions

特 (special)别 (kind)的 (particle)风 (wind)土 (land)人 (people)情 (feeling)

  • 这个地方有特别的风土人情。This place has unique local customs and traditions.
Read more →
儿ér化huà音yīnerhua / northern -r sound

儿 (erhua)化 (transform)音 (sound)

  • 北京话里有很多儿化音。Beijing speech has a lot of erhua sounds.

基jī督dū教jiàoChristianity

基 (foundation)督 (christ)教 (religion)

  • 基督教在很多国家都有信徒。Christianity has believers in many countries.

十shí字zì架jiàcross

十 (ten)字 (character)架 (frame)

  • 教堂上有一个十字架。There is a cross on the church.

culture-history 2

朝cháo代dàidynasty

朝 (dynasty)代 (era)

  • 唐朝是中国历史上很有名的朝代。The Tang was a famous dynasty in Chinese history.

文 (writing)言 (speech)

  • 文言文对我来说很难。Classical Chinese is very difficult for me.

culture-society 3

少shǎo数shù民mín族zúethnic minority

少 (few)数 (number)民 (people)族 (group)

  • 中国有很多少数民族。China has many ethnic minorities.
Read more →

白 (pale)幼 (young)瘦 (thin)

  • “白幼瘦”是一种有争议的审美标准。“Pale, young, and thin” is a controversial beauty standard.

三sān观guānworldview / core values

三 (three)观 (view)

  • 我觉得我们的三观不太一样。I feel like our core values are not quite the same.

disagreement-softener 5

话huà是shì这zhè么me说shuōthat may be true, but…

话 (words)是 (be)这 (this)么 (suffix)说 (say)

  • 话是这么说，但是做起来没那么容易。That may be true, but it’s not that easy to do.
Read more →
也yě许xǔ我wǒ是shì错cuò的deI may be wrong

也 (also)许 (perhaps)我 (I)是 (be)错 (wrong)的 (particle)

  • 也许我是错的，但是我觉得我们走错方向了。I may be wrong, but I think we’re going the wrong way.
Read more →
不bù一yí定dìngnot necessarily

不 (not)一 (one)定 (certain)

  • 学得久不一定学得好。Studying for a long time doesn’t necessarily mean studying well.
Read more →
也yě不bù能néng这zhè么me说shuōnot quite / you can’t really say that

也 (also)不 (not)能 (can)这 (this)么 (suffix)说 (say)

  • 中文太难了！也不能这么说，关键是看你怎么学。Chinese is too hard! Not quite — the key is how you study.
Read more →
不bú至zhì于yú吧basurely not that bad

不 (not)至 (reach)于 (to)吧 (modal)

  • 哭成这样？不至于吧。Crying this much? Surely not.

education 4

本běn科kēbachelor’s degree / undergraduate program

本 (root)科 (field)

  • 我现在在读本科。I’m currently studying for a bachelor’s degree.
Read more →
积jī累lěi知zhī识shíto accumulate knowledge

积 (accumulate)累 (pile)知 (know)识 (knowledge)

  • 学语言需要慢慢积累知识。Learning a language requires slowly accumulating knowledge.
Read more →
学xué者zhěscholar

学 (study)者 (person)

  • 他是一位研究中国历史的学者。He is a scholar who studies Chinese history.
Read more →
掌zhǎng握wòto master / grasp

掌 (palm)握 (grasp)

  • 我还没完全掌握这个语法。I haven’t fully mastered this grammar yet.
Read more →

emotions 4

疲pí惫bèiexhausted / fatigued

疲 (tired)惫 (exhausted)

  • 今天我感觉很疲惫。I feel very exhausted today.
Read more →
羡xiàn慕mù嫉jí妒dù恨hènextremely envious / jealous

羡 (envy)慕 (admire)嫉 (jealous)妒 (resent)恨 (hate)

  • 看到他去旅行，我真是羡慕嫉妒恨。Seeing him go traveling, I’m extremely envious.
Read more →
完wán蛋dàn了leI’m screwed / it’s over

完 (done)蛋 (egg)了 (particle)

  • 完蛋了，我忘带钱包了。I’m screwed, forgot my wallet.

Playful or genuine “I’m doomed”; common spoken filler.

Read more →
受shòu不bù了liǎocan’t stand it

受 (bear)不 (not)了 (able)

  • 这天气我受不了。Can’t stand this weather.

了 here = liǎo (potential complement).

Read more →

emotions-opinions 3

佩pèi服fúto admire / respect

佩 (admire)服 (respect)

  • 我很佩服你的坚持。I really admire your persistence.
Read more →
顾gù虑lǜconcern / worry; to have concerns

顾 (consider)虑 (worry)

  • 我有一点顾虑。I have some concerns.
Read more →
厉lì害haiimpressive / awesome

厉 (severe)害 (harm)

  • 你太厉害了！You’re amazing!

Praise; also describes intense/severe things.

Read more →

emphasis 5

最zuì重zhòng要yào的de是shìthe most important thing is

最 (most)重 (heavy)要 (important)的 (particle)是 (be)

  • 最重要的是每天都练习。The most important thing is to practice every day.
Read more →
关guān键jiàn是shìthe key is

关 (crucial)键 (key)是 (be)

  • 关键是你有没有用对方法。The key is whether you’re using the right method.
Read more →
更gèng重zhòng要yào的de是shìmore importantly

更 (more)重 (heavy)要 (important)的 (particle)是 (be)

  • 更重要的是，大家都同意。More importantly, everyone agrees.
Read more →
居jū然ránunexpectedly / actually

居 (actually)然 (so)

  • 他居然没来！He didn’t show — unbelievable!

Emphasizes surprise more emotionally than the cousin 竟然.

Read more →
有yǒu点diǎn儿era bit / a little

有 (have)点 (bit)儿 (erhua)

  • 我有点儿累。I’m a bit tired.

Typically carries a slightly negative tilt (a bit too X).

Read more →

erhua 1

有yǒu点diǎn儿era bit / a little

有 (have)点 (bit)儿 (erhua)

  • 我有点儿累。I’m a bit tired.

Typically carries a slightly negative tilt (a bit too X).

Read more →

everyday-vocab 65

油yóu管guǎnYouTube

油 (oil)管 (tube)

  • 我经常在油管上看中文视频。I often watch Chinese videos on YouTube.
Read more →
蛋dàn白bái质zhìprotein

蛋 (egg)白 (white)质 (substance)

  • 鸡蛋和肉都有很多蛋白质。Eggs and meat have a lot of protein.
Read more →
碳tàn水shuǐcarbs / carbohydrates

碳 (carbon)水 (water)

  • 米饭和面条都是碳水。Rice and noodles are both carbs. Casual short form of 碳水化合物.
Read more →
抖dǒu音yīnDouyin / Chinese TikTok

抖 (shake)音 (sound)

  • 这个视频是在抖音上火起来的。This video became popular on Douyin.
Read more →
民mín歌gēfolk song

民 (folk)歌 (song)

  • 我想听一些中国民歌。I want to listen to some Chinese folk songs.
Read more →
省shěng份fènprovince

省 (province)份 (share)

  • 四川是中国的一个省份。Sichuan is a province in China.
Read more →
母mǔ语yǔnative language

母 (mother)语 (language)

  • 你的母语是什么？What is your native language?
Read more →
网wǎng飞fēiNetflix

网 (net)飞 (fly)

  • 你平时看网飞吗？Do you usually watch Netflix?
Read more →
歌gē词cílyrics

歌 (song)词 (words)

  • 这首歌的歌词很美。The lyrics of this song are beautiful.
Read more →
本běn科kēbachelor’s degree / undergraduate program

本 (root)科 (field)

  • 我现在在读本科。I’m currently studying for a bachelor’s degree.
Read more →
发fā财cáito get rich / make a fortune

发 (issue)财 (wealth)

  • 祝你新年发财！Wishing you prosperity in the new year!
Read more →
抱bào负fùaspiration / ambition

抱 (embrace)负 (carry)

  • 他是一个很有抱负的人。He is a very ambitious person.
Read more →
圣shèng诞dàn节jiéChristmas

圣 (holy)诞 (birth)节 (festival)

  • 你圣诞节有什么计划？What plans do you have for Christmas?
Read more →
圣shèng诞dàn老lǎo人rénSanta Claus

圣 (holy)诞 (birth)老 (old)人 (person)

  • 小孩子相信圣诞老人。Children believe in Santa Claus.
Read more →
朝cháo代dàidynasty

朝 (dynasty)代 (era)

  • 唐朝是中国历史上很有名的朝代。The Tang was a famous dynasty in Chinese history.
Read more →
下xià载zàito download

下 (down)载 (load)

  • 我已经下载了这个软件。I already downloaded this software.
Read more →
座zuò右yòu铭míngmotto / life motto

座 (seat)右 (right)铭 (inscription)

  • 你的座右铭是什么？What is your motto?
Read more →
目mù标biāogoal / target

目 (eye)标 (mark)

  • 我的目标是每天学习中文。My goal is to study Chinese every day.
Read more →
极jí光guāngaurora / northern lights

极 (pole)光 (light)

  • 在芬兰有时候可以看到极光。In Finland, sometimes you can see the aurora.
Read more →
诗shī词cípoetry / classical poetry

诗 (poetry)词 (lyric)

  • 我想学习一些中国诗词。I want to study some Chinese poetry.
Read more →
俚lǐ语yǔslang

俚 (slang)语 (language)

  • 这个词是俚语吗？Is this word slang?
Read more →
本běn地dìlocal

本 (this)地 (place)

  • 这是本地人常去的餐厅。This is a restaurant local people often go to.
Read more →
佩pèi服fúto admire / respect

佩 (admire)服 (respect)

  • 我很佩服你的坚持。I really admire your persistence.
Read more →
八bā卦guàgossip / to gossip

八 (eight)卦 (trigram)

  • 她很喜欢八卦明星的事情。She really likes gossiping about celebrities.
Read more →
热rè身shēnwarm up

热 (warm)身 (body)

  • 运动前要先热身。You should warm up before exercising.
Read more →
间jiàn谍diéspy

间 (covert)谍 (spy)

  • 电影里的主角是一个间谍。The main character in the movie is a spy.
Read more →
少shǎo数shù民mín族zúethnic minority

少 (few)数 (number)民 (people)族 (group)

  • 中国有很多少数民族。China has many ethnic minorities.
Read more →
直zhí播bōlivestream / to livestream

直 (direct)播 (broadcast)

  • 他今晚要直播打游戏。He is going to livestream playing games tonight.
Read more →
经jīng典diǎnclassic

经 (classic)典 (canon)

  • 这是一首经典老歌。This is a classic old song.
Read more →
延yán迟chídelay / latency

延 (delay)迟 (late)

  • 今天网络延迟很高。The network latency is high today.
Read more →
风fēng景jǐngscenery

风 (wind)景 (view)

  • 这里的风景很漂亮。The scenery here is beautiful.
Read more →
不bù知zhī不bù觉jué地dìunconsciously / without realizing it

不 (not)知 (know)觉 (perceive)地 (adverbial)

  • 不知不觉地，我已经学了一个小时。Without realizing it, I had already studied for an hour.
Read more →
点diǎn赞zànto like / give a thumbs up online

点 (click)赞 (praise)

  • 如果你喜欢这个视频，记得点赞。If you like this video, remember to give it a like.
Read more →
地dì道dàoauthentic / genuine

地 (earth)道 (way)

  • 他的中文说得很地道。His Chinese sounds very authentic.
Read more →
加jiā密mìencryption / to encrypt

加 (add)密 (secret)

  • 这个文件需要加密。This file needs to be encrypted.
Read more →
模mó仿fǎngto imitate

模 (model)仿 (imitate)

  • 他很会模仿别人的声音。He is good at imitating other people’s voices.
Read more →
天tiān才cáigenius

天 (heaven)才 (talent)

  • 他真是个音乐天才。He really is a musical genius.
Read more →
障zhàng碍àibarrier / obstacle

障 (block)碍 (hinder)

  • 语言不是最大的障碍。Language is not the biggest barrier.
Read more →
网wǎng名míngusername / online name

网 (net)名 (name)

  • 你的网名是什么意思？What does your username mean?
Read more →
一yì模mú一yí样yàngexactly the same / identical

一 (one)模 (mold)样 (appearance)

  • 这两个东西一模一样。These two things are exactly the same.

零líng星xīngscattered / here and there

零 (scattered)星 (star)

  • 我只记得一些零星的信息。I only remember some scattered information.

服fú兵bīng役yìto serve in the military

服 (serve)兵 (soldier)役 (duty)

  • 在有些国家，年轻人必须服兵役。In some countries, young people must serve in the military.

强qiáng制zhì的demandatory / compulsory

强 (forceful)制 (compel)的 (particle)

  • 这个课程是强制的吗？Is this course mandatory?

时shí髦máofashionable / trendy

时 (current)髦 (stylish)

  • 这件衣服很时髦。This piece of clothing is very fashionable.
Read more →
贬biǎn义yì词cíderogatory term

贬 (negative)义 (meaning)词 (word)

  • 这个词是贬义词，最好别乱用。This word is derogatory, so it’s best not to use it carelessly.
Read more →
超chāo模mósupermodel

超 (super)模 (model)

  • 她以前是一个超模。She used to be a supermodel.

沉chén稳wěncomposed / steady

沉 (calm)稳 (steady)

  • 他做事很沉稳。He handles things in a composed way.

学xué者zhěscholar

学 (study)者 (person)

  • 他是一位研究中国历史的学者。He is a scholar who studies Chinese history.

顾 (consider)虑 (worry)

  • 我有一点顾虑。I have some concerns.

疲pí惫bèiexhausted / fatigued

疲 (tired)惫 (exhausted)

  • 今天我感觉很疲惫。I feel very exhausted today.

噩è梦mèngnightmare

噩 (terrible)梦 (dream)

  • 我昨晚做了一个噩梦。I had a nightmare last night.
Read more →

滤 (filter)镜 (lens)

  • 这张照片用了滤镜。This photo used a filter.

美měi颜yánbeauty filter / beautifying effect

美 (beautify)颜 (face)

  • 直播软件里常常有美颜功能。Livestreaming apps often have beauty filter features.
Read more →
精jīng髓suǐessence / core idea

精 (essence)髓 (marrow)

  • 这句话抓住了问题的精髓。This sentence captures the essence of the problem.

复fù杂zácomplicated / complex

复 (multiple)杂 (mixed)

  • 这个语法点有点复杂。This grammar point is a bit complicated.

掌zhǎng握wòto master / grasp

掌 (palm)握 (grasp)

  • 我还没完全掌握这个语法。I haven’t fully mastered this grammar yet.

提tí示shìhint / prompt / reminder

提 (raise)示 (show)

  • 你能给我一个提示吗？Can you give me a hint?
Read more →
人rén工gōng智zhì能néngartificial intelligence

人 (human)工 (made)智 (intelligence)能 (ability)

  • 人工智能正在改变很多行业。Artificial intelligence is changing many industries.
Read more →
不bù可kě思sī议yì的deunbelievable / incredible

不 (not)可 (can)思 (think)议 (discuss)的 (particle)

  • 这是一个不可思议的故事。This is an unbelievable story.
Read more →
差chà不bu多duōabout / roughly / close enough

差 (differ)不 (not)多 (much)

  • 差不多了，我们走吧。Close enough, let’s go.

习xí惯guàn了legot used to it

习 (habit)惯 (accustomed)了 (perfective)

  • 早起？习惯了。Wake up early? Used to it.

有yǒu点diǎn儿era bit / a little

有 (have)点 (bit)儿 (erhua)

  • 我有点儿累。I’m a bit tired.

Typically carries a slightly negative tilt (a bit too X).

稍shāo微wēislightly / a bit

稍 (slightly)微 (tiny)

  • 稍微等一下。Wait just a moment.

来lái不bù及jícan’t make it in time

来 (come)不 (not)及 (in time)

  • 来不及了，快走！No time, let’s go!

来lái得de及jístill time / can make it

来 (come)得 (able)及 (in time)

  • 还来得及，别急。Still time, don’t rush.

filler 3

那nà个geum / uh

那 (that)个 (measure)

  • 那个……我刚刚要说什么来着？Uh… what was I about to say?

怎zěn么me说shuō呢nehow should I put it

怎 (how)么 (suffix)说 (say)呢 (modal)

  • 他这个人嘛，怎么说呢，挺有意思的。This guy, how should I put it… he’s quite interesting.
